title: salix × laurina
intro: Salix × laurina, also known as weeping willow or golden willow, is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Salix alba (white willow) and Salix fragilis (crack willow). The medicinal properties of Salix × laurina include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its salicylic acid content. The health benefits of Salix × laurina include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Salix × laurina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, sore throats, and skin irritations.
